question: ఉపజిల్లాలను వాటి మొత్తం ఆలోపతిక అవుట్పేషన్ హాజరు ప్రకారం, అత్యధికం నుండి అత్యల్పం వరకు ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(f.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) AS total_attendance
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY d
JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES f ON d.GEOGRAPHY_ID = f.GEOGRAPHY_ID
GROUP BY d.SUB_DISTRICT
ORDER BY total_attendance DESC;
raw_output:

FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY d
JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES f ON d.GEOGRAPHY_ID = f.GEOGRAPHY_ID
GROUP BY d.SUB_DISTRICT

question:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
500 BCG టీకాలు ఇవ్వబడిన గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలను, అత్యధిక మొత్తం నుండి అత్యల్ప మొత్తం వరుసలో క్రమబద్ధీకరించి జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) > 500 ORDER BY SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT, 
    SUM(fc.BCG_VACCINE) AS total_bcg
FROM 
    FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE fc
JOIN 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY d ON fc.GEOGRAPHY_ID = d.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE 
    d.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'
    AND fc.BCG_VACCINE >= 500
GROUP BY 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT
ORDER BY 
    total_bcg DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT, 
    SUM(fc.BCG_VACCINE) AS total_bcg
FROM 
    FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE fc
JOIN 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY d ON fc.GEOGRAPHY_ID = d.GEOGRAPHY_ID

    d.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'
    AND fc.BCG_VACCINE >= 500
GROUP BY 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT
ORDER BY 
    total_bcg DESC;
